name: Systems thinking
description: Sees second-order effects and designs primitives/flows that scale.

levels.label: Emerging
behavioral_indicators: Local optimizations that create downstream issues

levels.label: Solid
behavioral_indicators: Understands module boundaries; limited cross-system foresight

levels.label: Strong
behavioral_indicators: Designs flows that reduce future toil; documents trade-offs

levels.label: Exceptional
behavioral_indicators: Builds primitives enabling 10x leverage; anticipates failure modes
